copypastas.text: 🏆 Prediction “Will fl0m win the match?” finished: The result is: Yes. 📊 Stats, highlights & more: https://faceitsync.com/en/fl0m

honse MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

LIZARD Hi fl0m- It’s me, your only Gooner. For Months I have worked and it has created the illusion that you are streaming to a large set of gooners. But here’s the truth: all these goobers in the chat are me. And now, for you to be convinced of this, I will send this message from all my gooning accounts. LIZARD

nice rounds man! first time properly watching your plays and my impressions are, awesome IGL-ing and good reads, just feels like you're not enjoying yourself as much as you enjoy others doing well. Seems that you're just very strict upon yourself for something you're doing quite good at, hence surprised with the humbleness ..
